nasb.text: At that time Rezin king of Aram recovered Elath for Aram, and cleared the Judeans out of Elath entirely; and the Arameans came to Elath and have lived there to this day.

esv.text: At that time Rezin the king of Syria recovered Elath for Syria and drove the men of Judah from Elath, and the Edomites came to Elath, where they dwell to this day.

cnv.text: 當時，亞蘭王利汛收復以拉他歸與亞蘭。他把猶大人逐出以拉他，亞蘭人來到以拉他住在那裡，直到今日。

ccb.text: 当时，亚兰王利汛收复以拉他，赶走城内的犹大人。亚兰人至今居住在那里。
